posts.author: OnceADroplet
posts.title: Coulter's Law

posts.raw_content:
He explained how Canadians are TERRIFIED of being labelled a Racist.

He explained that if you run a small service business and compete with all the Jeets, you can ask 2x the price, and White customers will still choose you over them. 

He explained that anyone willing to capitalize on White's not wanting to do business with the Jeets in Canada is making a killing. 

And there is nothing the Government can do because these are small service companies that do personal one on one services like trades, or tech in homes and small businesses.

So basically Whites in Canada are happy to pay a premium quietly to do business in Canada.

He then laughed and said, the funniest thing is when a Jeet calls for service and asks him the price, and then tells him that he is too expensive. 

He said, so not only does he get all White Customers, but the Jeets turn themselves away on price alone. At least the ones not worth dealing with anyhow.

So you see, you just need to adapt. It never matters what a Government does, you can always find a way between the cracks.

Buddy says, what are they going to do, close him down for having almost all White customers?? 

Smart Dude. He used to work in corporate IT until they tried to make him Train his Jeet replacement.
